# MBTA Tracker

MBTA Tracker is a search-first Boston transit web app focused on fast discovery, live arrivals, route and stop detail, vehicle tracking, commute intelligence, and trip planning.

## Primary Experience
- Search routes, stops, addresses, and vehicles from the home page
- View live arrivals and nearby stop recommendations
- Inspect route-level stop sequences and crowding guidance
- Track a vehicle with next-stop detail
- Read alerts and realtime status updates

## Public Entry Points
- `/` search-first transit home
- `/share` public share and FAQ landing page
- `/embed` embeddable widget view
- `/health` basic health endpoint

## APIs
- `/api/search`
- `/api/route/*`
- `/api/stop/*`
- `/api/vehicle/*`
- `/api/alerts`
- `/api/telemetry`

## Credits
- MBTA data
- MapLibre
- OpenStreetMap
- Nominatim
- CARTO
